task_completion.description: Enter the visitor's name and company.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for input fields containing 'Emmett Brown' (or 'Dr. Emmett Brown') for the name and 'Future Industries' for the company.

task_completion.description: Set the visit date to yesterday and the purpose to maintenance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a date picker or text field showing yesterday's date (relative to the system date visible in the OS taskbar) and a field or dropdown indicating 'Maintenance' as the visit purpose.

task_completion.description: Set the check-in and check-out times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for time input fields or dropdowns showing '09:00 AM' (or 09:00) for check-in and '10:30 AM' (or 10:30) for check-out.

task_completion.description: Submit or save the visitor record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Add' button, followed by the new record appearing in the main visitor log list.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the visitor log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking an 'Export', 'Download', or 'Save As' button within the visitor log application.

task_completion.description: Save the exported file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file save dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/' and the filename 'verification_export.csv', or a file manager/terminal confirming the file was saved to this exact location.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application to enter the visitor data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a graphical visitor management application, form, or spreadsheet being used, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file using the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog or save prompt originating from the application, rather than the agent manually creating a CSV file in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal command to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows where the agent uses 'echo' or python scripts to directly write the CSV file without interacting with the visitor log system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Visitor Name: Emmett Brown (or Dr. Emmett Brown). Company: Future Industries. Date: Yesterday (relative to the system clock). Purpose: Maintenance. Check-in: 09:00 AM. Check-out: 10:30 AM. Export Path: /home/ga/Documents/verification_export.csv.
